creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
(In reply to Christian Weisgerber from comment #0)

Thanks very much for pointing this out. I started digging out my sid collection and musicpd instantly crashes whenever I try to play a sidfile.

Error from the logs is:

ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libsidplayfp.so.6: Undefined symbol "__kmpc_fork_call"

I'm on FreeBSD/amd64 14.1-RELEASE.

Any ideas anyone?

Kind regards,
